title: RecommendationRequest
description: BFF -> recommendation service input. Maps an ambiguous requirement onto reference candidates, carrying the deterministic public outputs (canonical signature / structural diff) as opaque inputs. Wire form uses camelCase.

layoutVersion.description: Layout DSL schema version this request assumes (references the public schema).

topN.description: How many ranked candidates to return. Omitted = all.

similarityWeights.description: metric name -> weight for combining similarity (absolute basis). Omitted = server default.

signature.description: Opaque canonical signature from the public deterministic output. Uninterpreted here.
Opaque canonical signature (uninterpreted at this boundary).

structuralDiff.description: Consumed structural diff from the public deterministic output. Not recomputed here.

distance.description: Absolute 0-1 structural distance decided by the public side (0 = isomorphic). Consumed, not recomputed.
